front: What is the function of phosphoserine in signal transduction?
back: Phosphoserine residues are generated by Ser/Thr kinases (e.g., Akt, PKA, CK1/2). Dephosphorylation by PP1/PP2A phosphatases reverses signaling. Phosphoserine motifs recruit 14-3-3 proteins and FHA domain-containing effectors.
